title: VTeach Statement
description: VTeach enables you to teach a vision model from a SPEL program.
notes:
The object must exist before you can call VTeach. When VTeach executes, a snapshot is taken first, then the model is taught using the current model window (except for Blob objects, which use the search window).

When using the ColorMatch or ImageOp objects, you must first set the CurrentModel property before executing VTeach.

Note: After executing VTeach, you must call VSaveModel to make the changes permanent.
examples:
Integer status

VTeach seq1.corr01, status
If status = 1 Then VSaveModel seq1.corr01, "c:\models\corr01"
EndIf
